reference: I was told I have kidney stones. This was a shock to me due to the fact I have no symptoms. I went to get an ultrasound because my ribs were hurting badly and I had a lot of weight loss. They are having me strain my urine, and all I see are little black things that look like splinters. What is going on?
text: I was told I have kidney stones. This was a shock to me due to the fact I have no symptoms. I went to get an ultrasound because my ribs were hurting badly and I had a lot of weight loss. They are having me strain my urine and all I see are little black things that look like splinters. What is going on?
